description.value:
You are partially transformed into a wolf-human hybrid. You gain the following benefits while this effect is active and your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • Speed +10 feet
  • +2 status bonus to Athletics and Perception
  • Unarmed Strikes become Wolf Bite (1d10 piercing, trip, grapple) and Wolf Claws (1d6 slashing, agile, versatile P)
  • Unarmed Strikes are treated as magical

Remove this effect to revert to human form. Replace with Wolf: Full Beast Form to fully transform.
description.gm: This effect sets the wolf-human:hybrid-form roll option, which gates the Apex Wolf feat's physical resistance. The speed and skill bonuses are suppressed while Sea-Bound via their predicate.
